title: Motor Proof Job #1 — RECEIPT_COMPLETE close-out receipt with founder decision artifacts
verdict: NONE — builder does not self-certify; author != verifier required for any PASS.
laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.

closure_law_satisfied: deployed production SHA == candidate SHA == e0165192cd625366bb95a8f682db14e1facff58f == observed live content (NOT closed on 'copy appears live': deploy receipt binds deployment 05debd27-97ba-40dd-8fca-26a0f47986eb to the SHA; live bodies are byte-identical to the immutable per-deployment origin; X-Noetfield-Release header matches on every probed path)

decisions.question: Attribution: which candidate identity should the job record close against?

decisions.question: render_review: do you confirm the live rendering of noetfield.com / and /motors/ is acceptable?

decisions.question: Real cost for the job (L11 — no placeholder zeros)
